title: Battery Info
description: See your Battery level inside Minecraft!
body:
# **Battery Info**
**Battery Info** is a mod that shows your battery status in Minecraft. Basically a mod for **laptop users**.

## Information:
- **Battery Info** is a client-side mod.

- **Battery Info** only works on Windows, but don't worry, if your system isn't a Windows Build, **Battery Info** will be disabled.

- Feel free to use **Battery Info** wherever you want.

## Working:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/569b2345b909557b5de29b118cac4c21ef5c138b.gif)

**Shaders: [Spooklementary](https://www.modrinth.com/shader/spooklementary)**

Not much to say, i hope you like this mod.

**Well, if you want to leave me a tip, https://ko-fi.com/mateusmg2010**

**Thanks for downloading :)**
